---
id: env-reference-pipeline
sidebar_label: "⚙️ Env Reference"
title: "Environment Reference — pipeline-server"
---

import { EnvironmentReference } from '@site/src/components/PageLayouts/wave6';

<EnvironmentReference
  service="pipeline-server"
  configFile=".env.example"
  variables={[
    {
      name: "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY",
      required: true,
      type: "string",
      example: "sk-ant-api03-xxxxxxxxxxxx",
      description: "Anthropic API key for Claude LLM calls. Required when LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic.",
      service: "Anthropic",
      secret: true
    },
    {
      name: "LLM_PROVIDER",
      required: false,
      type: "enum",
      default: "anthropic",
      example: "anthropic",
      description: "Which LLM backend to use. Use 'databricks' to route LLM calls through your Databricks workspace.",
      enumValues: ["anthropic", "databricks"]
    },
    {
      name: "DATABRICKS_ENDPOINT",
      required: false,
      type: "string",
      default: "databricks-meta-llama-3-1-70b-instruct",
      example: "databricks-meta-llama-3-1-70b-instruct",
      description: "Databricks model serving endpoint name. Only used when LLM_PROVIDER=databricks.",
      service: "Databricks"
    },
    {
      name: "DATABRICKS_TOKEN",
      required: false,
      type: "string",
      example: "dapi_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
      description: "Databricks personal access token for authenticating model serving API calls.",
      service: "Databricks",
      secret: true
    },
    {
      name: "DATABRICKS_HOST",
      required: false,
      type: "url",
      example: "https://adb-1234567890.12.azuredatabricks.net",
      description: "Databricks workspace URL. Required when LLM_PROVIDER=databricks.",
      service: "Databricks"
    },
    {
      name: "SERVER_PORT",
      required: false,
      type: "number",
      default: "8000",
      example: "8000",
      description: "Port for the FastAPI pipeline server. Must not conflict with Docusaurus (3000) or Slidev (3030)."
    },
    {
      name: "LOG_LEVEL",
      required: false,
      type: "enum",
      default: "INFO",
      example: "DEBUG",
      description: "Logging verbosity. Use DEBUG to see per-agent state diffs during pipeline execution.",
      enumValues: ["DEBUG", "INFO", "WARNING", "ERROR"]
    },
    {
      name: "OUTPUT_DIR",
      required: false,
      type: "string",
      default: "output/slides",
      example: "output/slides",
      description: "Directory where the pipeline writes generated Slidev .md files and copies image assets."
    },
    {
      name: "MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS",
      required: false,
      type: "number",
      default: "2",
      example: "2",
      description: "Maximum number of /generate requests to process concurrently. Each pipeline run uses ~1 CPU core during LLM calls."
    },
    {
      name: "ENABLE_LANGSMITH",
      required: false,
      type: "boolean",
      default: "false",
      example: "true",
      description: "Enable LangSmith tracing for pipeline runs. Requires LANGSMITH_API_KEY to be set."
    },
    {
      name: "LANGSMITH_API_KEY",
      required: false,
      type: "string",
      example: "lsv2_pt_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
      description: "LangSmith API key for pipeline run tracing. Only used when ENABLE_LANGSMITH=true.",
      service: "LangSmith",
      secret: true
    },
    {
      name: "LANGSMITH_PROJECT",
      required: false,
      type: "string",
      default: "docslide-ai",
      example: "docslide-ai-prod",
      description: "LangSmith project name for grouping traces. Traces appear under this project in the LangSmith UI.",
      service: "LangSmith"
    }
  ]}
/>
